commit_scope: Thread the living-surface north star through public doorway docs, generated readmes, locale copy, and web entry pages

commands: jq empty web/messages/en.json web/messages/de.json web/messages/es.json web/messages/id.json

git diff --check -- README.template.md README.md cli/README.template.md cli/README.md mcp-server/README.template.md mcp-server/README.md skills/coherence-network/SKILL.template.md skills/coherence-network/SKILL.md docs/shared/shared-practice.md docs/shared/ecosystem-table.md docs/VISION.md docs/JOIN-NETWORK.md docs/doorway-comprehension.md docs/field/urs/welcoming-doorway-walk.md docs/SITE_MAP.md docs/coherence-substrate/form-language.md web/app/page.tsx web/app/come-in/page.tsx web/app/with-us/page.tsx web/messages/en.json web/messages/de.json web/messages/es.json web/messages/id.json

rg -n "center, ground, harmonize, return|Walk the fractal surface|fractal surface|simplest welcome|slowest welcome|speaks plainly|speaks to any human|spricht klar|habla llanamente|habla a cualquier humano|berbicara polos|sambutan paling|bienvenido más|einfachste Willkommen|langsamste Willkommen|slowest entry|entry is at \\[\/come-in\\]" README.md README.template.md cli/README.md cli/README.template.md mcp-server/README.md mcp-server/README.template.md skills/coherence-network/SKILL.md skills/coherence-network/SKILL.template.md docs/SITE_MAP.md docs/coherence-substrate/form-language.md docs/doorway-comprehension.md docs/field/urs/welcoming-doorway-walk.md web/app web/messages || true
local_validation.summary: Generated readmes are current, locale JSON parses, whitespace checks pass, stale doorway phrases and the old four-step rhythm were removed from the touched public surfaces, and the web production build passes. Browser assertions confirmed the home page exposes /here, /come-in renders the living-surface hinge and route edges, /begin and /with-us point back to /come-in and /here, and /here names the current-attention edge.

known_failed_attempts.command: Initial Playwright accessible-name check for the /come-in /here card
known_failed_attempts.output: The link check returned false because the assertion assumed the accessible name was only 'Attention'. A follow-up href/text assertion confirmed /here is present.

known_failed_attempts.command: Browser console capture before tending /with-us readArray probing
known_failed_attempts.output: Console showed existing [i18n] missing-key warnings from probing past translation-array ends. web/app/with-us/page.tsx now checks message existence before translating sentinel keys; follow-up browser capture showed no i18n missing-key warnings.

ci_validation.reason: No commit, push, or PR was created in this turn.

deploy_validation.reason: No production deploy was performed. Browser checks ran against the local Next dev server on port 3117.

phase_gate.reason: Local docs, web build, and browser proof passed, but CI and production deploy validation remain pending until this work is committed and shipped.

evidence_refs: README.template.md and generated README.md add Walk the living surface with concrete edges into /come-in, /practice, /begin, /vision, /presences, /with-us, /here, /ideas, /flow, /resonance, /substrate, and /contributions.
web/app/come-in/page.tsx now renders the orientation hinge: /begin, /here, /vision, /presences, /practice, /flow, /substrate, and /with-us as distinct edges into the same body.

docs/field/urs/welcoming-doorway-walk.md and docs/SITE_MAP.md now name distinct doorway roles instead of leaving /come-in, /begin, /here, /with-us, /welcome, /join, /vision/join, and /meet/{type}/{id} as competing or unnamed overlaps.

web/messages/en.json, de.json, es.json, and id.json align /come-in as the public orientation hinge, /here as current attention, /begin as becoming known, /with-us as deep invitation, and /join as advanced sovereign identity.
web/app/with-us/page.tsx removes development i18n sentinel warnings by checking message existence before translating array probe keys.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A public visitor or agent can enter through existing public doorways and see a coherent living-surface story: orient at /come-in, become known at /begin, sense current attention at /here, enter the deeper invitation at /with-us, and follow Form/substrate/proof edges without old wording that flattens the doorways into one generic welcome.
test_flows: Local browser / shows the new See what is alive now /here edge and the five-step rhythm language.
Local browser /come-in shows Walk the living surface and Every doorway is an edge into the same body, with /begin, /here, and /with-us links present.
Local browser /begin shows the public-doorway hinge copy and links to /here.
Local browser /here shows current-attention copy including the next edge that may want attention.
Local browser /with-us shows orientation copy, /here links, and no [i18n] missing-key warnings after the array-probe fix.

known_runtime_context.browser_console_notes: Remaining browser console errors during local dev were 502 responses from local /api proxy calls such as /api/views/ping, /api/workspaces, /api/translations/page/with-us, and /api/meetings/anonymous-traces while no local API backend was running. They are not introduced by this doorway copy pass.
